title: olearia cinerea
intro: Olearia cinerea, also known as the grey daisy bush, is a flowering shrub native to Australia, belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Olearia cinerea include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, often combined with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties.
